title: Task Envelope
description: Schema for typed task messages routed via the Task Bus

task_id.description: Unique UUIDv7 identifier for the task instance

type.description: Dotted path describing the task type (e.g. task.odoo.lint-module)

payload.description: The specific task payload matching the contract of the task type

source_agent_id.description: The AgentId that created this task

target_agent_id.description: The explicitly requested AgentId, if any (router may override)

correlation_id.description: Correlation identifier to group related tasks in a distributed tracing context

idempotency_key.description: Optional key to ensure task is only executed once
